name: seo
description: The SEO command for AI agents. Audit sites and research search opportunities with local, evidence-backed reports.
author: Ian Nuttall

scripts.build: turbo run build && pnpm run build:package
scripts.deploy:web: pnpm --filter @seo/web exec wrangler d1 migrations apply seo-telemetry --remote && pnpm --filter @seo/web exec wrangler deploy
scripts.lint: biome check . && node scripts/check-emdashes.mjs && node scripts/check-report-parity.mjs && pnpm run skills:validate && turbo run lint
scripts.lint:static: biome check . && node scripts/check-emdashes.mjs && node scripts/check-report-parity.mjs && pnpm run skills:validate
scripts.prepack: pnpm run skills:validate && pnpm run build:package && node --test scripts/package.test.mjs
scripts.security:check: pnpm run security:audit && pnpm run security:secrets
scripts.test: turbo run test && pnpm run build:package && node --test scripts/package.test.mjs scripts/dogfood-summary.test.mjs && node scripts/resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/provider-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/pseo-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/indexnow-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/bing-resource-harness.mjs && pnpm run skills:validate
scripts.test:built: turbo run test && node --test scripts/package.test.mjs scripts/dogfood-summary.test.mjs && node scripts/resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/provider-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/pseo-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/indexnow-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/bing-resource-harness.mjs && pnpm run skills:validate
scripts.test:resources: pnpm run build:package && node scripts/resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/provider-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/pseo-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/indexnow-resource-harness.mjs && node scripts/bing-resource-harness.mjs
scripts.test:package-install: pnpm --filter @seo/core build && pnpm --filter @seo/mcp build && pnpm run build:package && node --test scripts/installed-package.test.mjs
